html:
Exclusive to:  

The Battle Spear is a melee Weapon exclusive to Wigfrid. It can only be crafted by Wigfrid, and she starts the game with it in her Inventory, along with the Battle Helm. The Battle Spear requires 2 Twigs, 2 Flint, and 2 Gold Nugget to craft and is available to craft at the beginning of the game. Therefore, it is a great alternative to the Spear in the early game.

Skill Tree

Bragi's Blessing I

If Wigfrid has the Bragi's Blessing I skill, Inspiration gain rate will increase by 25% when attacking using Battle Spears.

Bragi's Blessing II

If Wigfrid has the Bragi's Blessing II skill, Inspiration gain rate will increase by 50% when attacking using Battle Spears.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Nordic Battle Spear skin was introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020.
  • The Woven - Elegant Ultimate Spear skin was introduced during the official Year of the Pig King event in 2019.
Woven - Elegant
Year of the Carrat Collection
Nordic Battle Spear
A fierce weapon favored by Viking warriors.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Year of the Pig King Collection
Ultimate Spear
Let them try to wrestle this away from you.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Winged Victory Collection
Winged Spear
Sure to soar straight and true to its target.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Moonbound Collection
Moonlight Spear
The shining spear of the moon's chosen champion.
See ingame

Tips

  • Wigfrid is allowed to give both the Battle Helm and Battle Spear to other players, making her an important asset to the team.
  • Spawning with a decent weapon allows easy hunting in early game.

Gallery

  • Battle Spear Equipped

–Wortox
“Took Viking lady's stab stick!!”
–Wurt
“No Woby, that's not a stick! Well, I guess it IS a stick...”
–Walter
“...I should try to stay on her good side.”
–Wanda
The Battle Spear is a melee Weapon exclusive to Wigfrid. It can only be crafted by Wigfrid, and she starts the game with it in her Inventory, along with the Battle Helm. The Battle Spear requires 2 Twigs, 2 Flint, and 2 Gold Nugget to craft and is available to craft at the beginning of the game. Therefore, it is a great alternative to the Spear in the early game.

Well, I guess it IS a stick... |wanda = ...I should try to stay on her good side. |choose = wigfrid }} The '''Battle Spear''' is a melee [[Weapon]] exclusive to [[Wigfrid]]. It can only be crafted by Wigfrid, and she starts the game with it in her [[Inventory]], along with the [[Battle Helm]]. Therefore, it is a great alternative to the [[Spear]] in the early game. == {{pic|32|Insight}} Skill Tree == === {{picDark|32|Bragi's Blessing I}}Bragi's Blessing I === If [[Wigfrid/Don't Starve Together|Wigfrid]] has the [[Bragi's Blessing|Bragi's Blessing I]] skill, Inspiration gain rate will increase by 25% when attacking using Battle Spears. === {{picDark|32|Bragi's Blessing I}}Bragi's Blessing II === If Wigfrid has the [[Bragi's Blessing|Bragi's Blessing II]] skill, Inspiration gain rate will increase by 50% when attacking using Battle Spears. __NOTOC__ == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Weapons Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Elegant Nordic Battle Spear''' skin was introduced during the official [[Year of the Carrat]] event in 2020. * The '''Woven - Elegant Ultimate Spear''' skin was introduced during the official [[Year of the Pig King]] event in 2019.
